chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Acquittal Appeal No.S-176 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on M.A. 12648/2024 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on M.A. 12649/2024 4. For hearing of main case 26.12.2024 Mr. Haji Khan Brohi, Advocate for Appellant. ----- 1. Granted. 2to4. Through this application, learned counsel for does not press this criminal miscellaneous application. Accordingly, listed application is allowed and criminal miscellaneous application is dismissed as not pressed. Learned counsel for petitioner submits that the petitioner has passed away, as such, she does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Through this application, learned counsel does not press this revision application, which is dismissed as not pressed along with pending application. Mr. Muhammad Raheem Gaju associate of Mian Taj Muhammad Keerio, Advocate for applicant, does not press this bail application as, according to him, the applicant has been convicted by the trial court on 08.10.2019. In view of above, this bail application is dismissed as not pressed. Learned counsel for petitioner does not press this petition and has drawn our attention to a statement dated 27.11.2018, which is to the same effect. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed along with pending application(s), if any. 2 Learned counsel for applicant does not press this application as, according to him, the detainee has surfaced and purpose of filing this application has been served. Accordingly, this Criminal Miscellaneous Application is dismissed as not pressed.

Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed along with pending application(s), if any. 2 Learned counsel for applicant does not press this application as, according to him, the detainee has surfaced and purpose of filing this application has been served. Accordingly, this Criminal Miscellaneous Application is dismissed as not pressed. None present. However, learned counsel for petitioners has filed a statement dated 25.05.2019 withdrawing instant petition. Accordingly, in view of above, this petition is dismissed as withdrawn along with pending application(s), if any. Urgency granted. Learned counsel for the applicant does not press this application and submits that he would file a bail application on behalf of applicant before the trial court on fresh ground of rule of consistency as the co-accused with similar role has been granted bail by the trial court. In view of above, this bail application is dismissed as not pressed. Mr. Shoukat Ali Kaka, Advocate, has filed power on behalf of petitioners and does not press this petition and has also drawn our attention to the application dated 02.04.2019, which has been filed for withdrawal of this petition by the petitioners in person. Accordingly, in view of above, this petition is dismissed as withdrawn along with pending application(s), if any. Petitioner No.1 present in person. -.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Petitioner No.1 Bashir Ahmed Rajpar is present and submits that grievance of the petitioners has been redressed as all of the petitioners have been regularized; therefore, he does not press this petition. We have seen that learned counsel for petitioners has filed a statement to that effect. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed. By means of a statement filed on 20.06.2018, learned counsel for the petitioner does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with pending application(s), if any. 3 Mr. Shakir Ali Talpur, Advocate, holding brief on behalf of Syed Tariq Ahmed Shah, Advocate for petitioner, does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. ---- Learned counsel for petitioner does not press this petition and seeks permission to file bail application before the trial court in view of an Ordinance No.XXIII of 2021 called as National Accountability (Second Amendment) Ordinance, 2021 dated 07th October, 2021.

By means of a statement filed on 20.06.2018, learned counsel for the petitioner does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with pending application(s), if any. 3 Mr. Shakir Ali Talpur, Advocate, holding brief on behalf of Syed Tariq Ahmed Shah, Advocate for petitioner, does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. ---- Learned counsel for petitioner does not press this petition and seeks permission to file bail application before the trial court in view of an Ordinance No.XXIII of 2021 called as National Accountability (Second Amendment) Ordinance, 2021 dated 07th October, 2021. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed in above terms along with listed application. JUDGE Ali Haider
